channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iconic Photographs of Faye Dunaway by Jerry Schatzberg
item.description: In the late 1950s, Jerry Schatzberg established himself as a prominent independent photographer, capturing images for top fashion magazines such as Vogue, Esquire, Life, and Glamour. Known for his nat...

item.title: Political Tensions and Transport Sector Disputes Amid Fuel Price Crisis in Kenya
item.description: Over the weekend, Kenyan papers focused on major political and economic developments. President William Ruto is facing a tricky situation as the country approaches the 2027 elections. Despite growing ...

item.title: Pakistan leads mediation as US-Iran talks advance amid tensions in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Pakistan's Chief of Defence Staff, Field Marshal Asim Munir, visited Tehran to mediate between the United States and Iran as negotiations entered a critical stage. The discussions are focused on stabi...

item.title: Oba of Benin Calls for Unity Among APC Edo South Members Amid Primary Election Dispute
item.description: The Oba of Benin, Omo N’Oba N’Edo Uku Akpolokpolo Ewuare II, don call for calm and unity among All Progressives Congress (APC) members wey dey involved for Edo South Senatorial primary election matter...

item.title: Analysis of Rupee’s Depreciation and Its Economic Implications
item.description: The Indian rupee is nearing a critical level of 100 against the US dollar, drawing widespread attention from economists, investors, and the public alike. While the current depreciation has raised conc...

item.title: Sentencing of Molly's killer delayed amid mental health defence
item.description: Tony and Kate Ticehurst were bracing for closure after the tragic murder of their daughter Molly in 2024, expecting the sentencing of Daniel Billings to conclude a prolonged legal ordeal. However, a r...

item.title: Tanzania presents sustainable beekeeping model at global pollination forum
item.description: Tanzania recently showcased her innovative approach to beekeeping at the Third International Forum for Action on Sustainable Beekeeping and Pollination, which was held in Maribor, Slovenia from May 20...

item.title: Alberta's Independence Referendum: Potential Outcomes and Historical Context
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith has proposed a complex referendum question regarding the province's future in Canada, designed to balance the interests of separatist supporters within her United Conser...

item.title: Seun Atolagbe Battles Despair After Visa Denial
item.description: Na April month when Seun Atolagbe waka back home to bury him papa. After the funeral, e try return USA where him don dey live for 21 years but the Embassy no gree give am Visa. This thing scatter am w...

item.title: Trump cites scheduling conflicts for missing son’s wedding despite frequent golf trips
item.description: President Donald Trump announced he would not attend his eldest son Donald Trump Jr.'s wedding in the Bahamas, citing that the timing was inconvenient given his presidential responsibilities and the u...

item.title: Gauteng continues to face high levels of organised crime despite national improvements
item.description: Despite encouraging national declines in key crime statistics, Gauteng remains the epicentre of violent organised crime in South Africa. Acting Police Minister Firoz Cachalia highlighted that the prov...

item.title: Prime Minister Approves Four-Year Extension for IB Director General
item.description: In a move aimed at ensuring stability and continuity in Pakistan's premier civilian intelligence agency, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has officially approved a four-year extension for Fuad Asadullah ...

item.title: Federal High Court clarifies INEC cannot restrict political parties’ 2027 election timelines
item.description: On May 20, 2026, the Federal High Court of Nigeria delivered a significant ruling in the case between Youth Party and INEC. The Court nullified INEC's restrictive deadlines and guidelines for the 2027...

item.title: Fire Destroys Fireworks Storage Facility in Cabuyao, Laguna
item.description: A storage facility containing fireworks materials caught fire in Cabuyao, Laguna, prompting swift response from local authorities. The Bureau of Fire Protection (BFP) was immediately alerted and dispa...

item.title: Barge Explosions in Staten Island Kill One Civilian, Injure Multiple Firefighters
item.description: A devastating series of explosions occurred at a Staten Island shipyard on Friday, resulting in the death of one civilian and injuries to 34 firefighters and emergency personnel. The first explosion s...

item.title: Evacuation Ordered for 40,000 in Orange County Due to Overheating Toxic Chemical Tank
item.description: Authorities in Garden Grove, California, have issued evacuation orders affecting roughly 40,000 residents due to a highly volatile chemical, methyl methacrylate (MMA), stored in an aerospace facility ...

item.title: Trump Holds Security Meeting as Diplomatic Talks with Iran Continue
item.description: President Donald Trump met with top U.S. national security officials on Friday to discuss potential actions regarding the ongoing conflict with Iran. The meeting, which is part of a routine series of ...

item.title: FIFA to provide sign language coverage for select 2026 World Cup games to aid deaf fans
item.description: FIFA don announce say dem go dey provide sign language broadcast for some selected matches for the 2026 World Cup wey go hold for US, Canada, and Mexico. Dis na part of dem effort to make football mor...

item.title: Emerald Fennell discusses cut scenes and artistic choices in Wuthering Heights adaptation
item.description: Emerald Fennell, director of the 2026 adaptation of Emily Brontë’s Wuthering Heights, expressed disappointment that a period-realistic scene showing Margot Robbie’s character Cathy with unshaven armpi...

item.title: Four Women Killed by Tigress While Collecting Tendu Leaves in Chandrapur
item.description: On the morning of May 22, 2026, a tragic incident occurred in the Gunjewahi forest area of Sindewahi tehsil in Chandrapur district, Maharashtra. Four women, who had ventured into the forest to collect...
